data.title: Simply Solventless reports Q2 2025 gross revenue at $13.0M, EBITDA at $4.3M, and $1.0M cash flow from operations.
data.description: Simply Solventless Concentrates Ltd. announced its Q2 2025 financial results, achieving record quarterly gross revenue of $13.0 million, EBITDA of $4.3 million, adjusted EBITDA of $3.2 million, and positive cash flow from operations of $1.0 million. President and CEO Jeff Swainson emphasized profitable growth and integration of subsidiaries like Humble, ANC, and Cannmart. The company's key highlights include a 5% increase in gross revenue, reaching 43.0% gross margin, and a positive cash flow of $1.0 million. The balance sheet figures revealed a 57% increase in total assets, with $60.5 million as of June 30, 2025. SSC aims for further growth by launching new products like the Sluggers brand and expanding into key markets.
Pakistan central bank invites bids for 14-day OMO

data.title: EU trade deal with US may pressure other countries to seek tariff relief; Trump's deal promises no new tariffs.
data.description: The trade deal negotiated by President Donald Trump with the European Union has the potential to accelerate action from other trade partners who seek guarantees against potential tariffs. This could influence them to expedite their efforts to secure similar agreements to avoid facing new tariffs set to be implemented next week.

data.title: Housing affordability improving as mortgage rates fall below 6.5%, making buying a home more accessible.
data.description: Currently, housing affordability has seen a positive shift with mortgage rates dipping below 6.5%. This has raised the question of who can now afford to purchase a home. The decrease in rates has made home buying more accessible to a larger demographic due to improved affordability. This change in rates has particularly benefited individuals looking to enter the housing market for the first time, as well as those seeking to refinance their existing homes. The lower rates have sparked interest and increased activity in the real estate market, with a notable rise in the number of prospective buyers. The drop in mortgage rates to below 6.5% has significantly impacted the housing market, making it a prime time for many to consider investing in homeownership.

data.title: Bill aims to boost ESOPs, could cost $100+ billion over next decade. Dueling JCT scores show debate over impact.
data.description: Proposing a bill aimed at encouraging businesses to provide employee stock ownership plans would come with a price tag exceeding $100 billion over the course of the next ten years.

data.title: Privia Health's ACOs saved over $233 million (+32% Y-Y) in 2024 MSSP performance year; EBITDA guidance raised for 2025.
data.description: During the 2024 MSSP Performance Year, Privia Health ACOs achieved savings of over $233 million, marking a significant increase of 32% compared to the previous year. As a result of this success, Privia Health has raised its Adjusted EBITDA guidance for the entirety of 2025.

data.title: Fed Gov. Adriana Kugler resigns, giving Trump chance to replace Jerome Powell; key decision in Fed leadership.
data.description: The unexpected resignation of Federal Reserve Governor Adriana Kugler has provided President Donald Trump with a significant chance to appoint a successor for Jerome Powell in the near future.

data.title: HBAR price remains stable at $0.24, with RSI at 46.62 signaling neutral momentum. Resistance at $0.28 is key for bullish trend.
data.description: The cryptocurrency HBAR is currently trading at $0.24, reflecting a decrease of 1.53% in daily trading. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) is at 46.62, indicating neutral momentum. It is important to note that the key resistance level stands at $0.28, which is significant for any potential bullish trend to continue.

data.title: Global headache as new Trump admin customs rule hampers mailing to the US - affecting driver's license renewal, specialty candy, and Christmas gifts.
data.description: Confusion has arisen due to a new customs rule implemented by the Trump administration, affecting various items such as a driver’s license renewal, a box of specialty candy, and early Christmas presents. Many individuals are facing delays and uncertainty in processing these items due to the new rule.
Indonesia Stock Exchange director says market fundamentals remain solid.

data.title: Crypto leaders join forces for $200M Bitcoin Infrastructure Acquisition SPAC, seeking to go public with a crypto venture.
data.description: A group of cryptocurrency industry leaders has joined forces to secure $200 million for a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC). The SPAC aims to identify a cryptocurrency-related business for a potential initial public offering (IPO).

data.title: Closed tariff loophole may impact shoppers as the $800 exemption on imports is no longer valid, causing confusion.
data.description: The recent elimination of the "de minimis" exemption allowing packages valued under $800 to enter the U.S. without tariffs has caused widespread confusion. Many individuals and businesses are grappling with the implications of this change, as they now have to navigate the tariffs on all imported goods regardless of their value. The removal of this exemption has significantly impacted the import process, forcing shippers to reassess their shipping strategies and potentially leading to increased costs for consumers. This shift has heightened uncertainty and complexity surrounding international trade, with many stakeholders seeking clarity on the new regulations and how they will affect their operations.

data.title: RomReal releases Q2 2025 results report and investor presentation.
data.description: RomReal is releasing details on their performance for the second quarter of 2025 through a report and Investor presentation included with this announcement.
